fullMultiPassReallocation.note: Removes all non-accepted round-1 rows, then reruns full multi-pass seat allocation per program using merit-list eligibility filters instead of slot-by-slot replacement claims.

iterativeVacancyUpgradeReplay.note: Starts from round-1 accepted placements, fills current vacancies by merit, allows only true upgrades from worse accepted seats, and pushes vacated old seats into the next iteration queue until stable.

hybridRelaxedInactiveReplay.note: Same iterative vacancy-upgrade replay, but does not auto-exclude candidates solely because they had a non-accepted round-1 seat.

hybridFifoReplay.note: Relaxed iterative replay with FIFO vacancy queue and next-cycle requeue.

hybridLifoReplay.note: Relaxed iterative replay with LIFO vacancy queue and next-cycle requeue.

hybridRowOrderReplay.note: Relaxed iterative replay with each pass sorted back into original round-1 merit row order.

hybridImmediateReplay.note: Relaxed iterative replay with FIFO queue and newly vacated seats processed immediately in the same cycle.

hybridProgramGroupedReplay.note: Relaxed iterative replay with vacancies grouped by program, then processed in row order within each program.

hybridRelaxedPriorityReplay.note: Relaxed iterative replay plus per-pass vacancy ordering by current best eligible candidate marks, so the strongest reachable upgrades claim vacancies first.

globalCandidatePassReplay.note: Each cycle scans candidates in descending merit order, lets each candidate claim the best currently vacant seat they can newly reach, and re-enqueues vacated old seats for the next cycle.
